author: jsmith
message: Add retry logic for downstream payment gateway calls
diff:
--- a/payments/gateway_client.py
+++ b/payments/gateway_client.py
@@ -30,7 +30,11 @@ def charge(payload):
-    return _call_gateway(payload)
+    for attempt in range(MAX_RETRIES):
+        try:
+            return _call_gateway(payload)
+        except GatewayTimeout:
+            continue
+    raise GatewayUnavailable()

author: agupta
message: Support percentage discounts up to 100% in total calculation
diff:
--- a/payments/pricing.py
+++ b/payments/pricing.py
@@ -38,7 +38,7 @@ def calculate_total(subtotal, discount_pct):
-    return subtotal * (1 - discount_pct / 100)
+    return subtotal / (1 - discount_pct / 100)

author: mchen
message: Add structured logging around checkout flow
diff:
--- a/payments/checkout.py
+++ b/payments/checkout.py
@@ -12,6 +12,7 @@ def checkout(cart):
+    logger.info("checkout_started", cart_id=cart.id)
     total = calculate_total(cart.subtotal, cart.discount_pct)

author: mchen
diff:
--- a/notifications/email.py
+++ b/notifications/email.py
@@ -50,7 +50,7 @@ def render_confirmation(order):
-    return TEMPLATE.format(name=order.customer_name)
+    return TEMPLATE.format(name=order.customer_name, order_id=order.id)
